description: Escape to the vibrant streets of Lisbon, where the sun-kissed facades and the aroma of fresh pastries beckon you to explore. This 3-day culinary adventure is designed for friends seeking relaxation and gastronomic delights, blending the city's rich history with its modern flair. Get ready to savor the flavors of Portugal while soaking in the breathtaking views from its iconic hills.

activities.description: Start your day with the iconic Pastéis de Belém, famous for its delicious custard tarts. Pair it with a strong Portuguese coffee for the perfect morning boost.
Wander through the narrow, winding streets of Alfama, the oldest district in Lisbon. Enjoy the vibrant atmosphere, colorful houses, and stunning views from the Miradouro de Santa Luzia.
Savor a delightful lunch at A Cevicheria, known for its fresh ceviche and seafood dishes. The casual yet trendy atmosphere makes it a perfect spot to relax and enjoy local flavors.
After lunch, visit the stunning Lisbon Cathedral, a beautiful example of Romanesque architecture. Take a moment to appreciate its impressive interior and the peaceful atmosphere.
Head to Praça do Comércio, one of the largest squares in Europe. Enjoy the view of the Tagus River and the grand archway, perfect for some memorable photos.

activities.activity: Coffee Break at Café A Brasileira
activities.description: Take a break at Café A Brasileira, one of the oldest and most famous cafés in Lisbon. Enjoy a bica (espresso) while soaking in the artistic vibe of the place.
Wander through the Baixa district, known for its elegant squares and shopping streets. Don't miss the beautiful Rua Augusta and the Santa Justa Lift for panoramic views of the city.
End your day at the Time Out Market, where you can sample a variety of dishes from some of Lisbon's best chefs. It's a food lover's paradise with something for everyone.

transit.memo: Enjoy a scenic train ride along the coast to Cascais.

activities.description: Stroll through the charming streets of Cascais, where colorful buildings and quaint shops create a picturesque atmosphere. Don't miss the local artisan shops for unique souvenirs!
Savor fresh seafood at Mar do Inferno, known for its stunning ocean views and delicious grilled fish. A perfect spot to relax and enjoy the coastal breeze.
Head to Boca do Inferno, a dramatic cliff formation where waves crash against the rocks. It's a breathtaking sight and a great photo opportunity!
Unwind at Praia da Rainha, a beautiful beach surrounded by cliffs. Take a dip in the refreshing waters or simply relax on the sand with a good book.
Enjoy a coffee or a light snack at Casa da Guia, a charming café with stunning views of the coastline. It's a lovely spot to reflect on your day in Cascais.
Take the train back to Lisbon, reflecting on a wonderful day spent in Cascais. The journey offers beautiful views of the coastline as the sun sets.

transit.memo: Take the train from Rossio Station to Sintra for a scenic ride.

activities.description: Start your day at the stunning Pena Palace, a colorful Romanticist castle perched on a hill. Explore its whimsical architecture and enjoy breathtaking views of the surrounding landscape.
Savor traditional Portuguese tapas at Tascantiga, a cozy eatery known for its delicious small plates and local wines. It's a perfect spot to recharge before more sightseeing.
Visit the enchanting Quinta da Regaleira, a UNESCO World Heritage site. Wander through its mystical gardens, hidden tunnels, and the famous Initiation Well, a true gem of Sintra.
Explore the historic Sintra National Palace, known for its distinctive chimneys and beautiful tile work. Learn about its royal history and enjoy the serene atmosphere.
Head back to Lisbon by train, reflecting on the magical day spent in Sintra. The journey offers a chance to relax and enjoy the scenic views once more.
End your day at the vibrant Time Out Market, where you can sample a variety of dishes from some of Lisbon's best chefs. It's a food lover's paradise with something for everyone.
